message.content:
@startuml
skinparam classAttributeIconSize 0
skinparam classFontColor black
skinparam classBackgroundColor white
skinparam classBorderColor black
skinparam classHeaderBackgroundColor #d9ead3
skinparam classHeaderFontColor black
skinparam classHeaderBorderColor black
skinparam classHeaderBorderThickness 1
skinparam classHeaderAlignment center
skinparam classAttributeFontColor black
skinparam classAttributeBackgroundColor white
skinparam classAttributeBorderColor black
skinparam classAttributeBorderThickness 1
skinparam classMethodFontColor black
skinparam classMethodBackgroundColor white
skinparam classMethodBorderColor black
skinparam classMethodBorderThickness 1
skinparam classMethodAlignment left
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconColor black
skinparam classMethodIconBackgroundColor white
skinparam classMethodIconBorderColor black
skinparam classMethodIconBorderThickness 1
skinparam classMethodIconAlignment left
skinparam classMethodIconPadding 0
skinparam classMethodIconMargin 0
skinparam classMethodIconSpacing 0
skinparam classMethodIconOffset 0
skinparam classMethodIconPosition left
skinparam classMethodIconSize 0
skinparam classMethodIconColor black
skinparam classMethodIconBackgroundColor white
skinparam classMethodIconBorderColor black
skinparam classMethodIconBorderThickness 1
skinparam classMethodIconAlignment left
skinparam classMethodIconPadding 0
skinparam classMethodIconMargin 0
skinparam classMethodIconSpacing 0
skinparam classMethodIconOffset 0
skinparam classMethodIconPosition left

class TicTacToe {
    + turn : Turn
    + board : Board
    + players : Player[] [0..*]
    + TicTacToe()
    + Play()
}

class Board {
    + Color : char[,] [0..*] = {'x', 'o'}
    + tokens : char[,] [0..*]
    + Board()
    + IsTicTacToe() : bool
    + IsTicTacToe(token : char) : bool
    + IsComplete() : bool
    + IsTileEmpty(row : int, column: int) : bool
    + IsTileFull(row : int, column: int) : bool
    + ToString() : string
}

class Player {
    + color : char
    + Player(i: int)
    + Put(board : Board)
    + Move(board : Board)
    + Win()
}

class Turn {
    + value : int = 0
    + Turn()
    + Current() «"Take"»
    + Next() «"NotTake"»
    + Change()
}

class IO {
    <<static>>
    + ReadString(title : string) : string
    + ReadInt(title : string) : int
    + Write(title : string)
    + WriteLn()
    + WriteError(format : string)
}

TicTacToe --> Board
TicTacToe --> Player
TicTacToe --> Turn
Board ..> IO
Player ..> IO

@enduml
